title: Connect Board Columns 'text' Value is null despite connected item(s)
excerpt:
Having this issue on multiple boards and multiple connect-board ‘board-relation’ columns. Not sure when it became a problem. 
Per https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/connect#reading-the-connect-boards-column - the A…

posts.author: bmack (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml:
image1505×477 47.6 KB

Having this issue on multiple boards and multiple connect-board ‘board-relation’ columns. Not sure when it became a problem.
Per https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/connect#reading-the-connect-boards-column - the API should return the data.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @bmack!

We are going to need you to please send this information to appsupport@monday.com so we can take a closer look into it, look into the logs and give this issue some following

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Matias.Monday @bmack

Have either of you gotten a resolution on this? I have recently experienced the same issue.

posts.author: bmack (Brian)
posts.cookedHtml: I submitted a ticket in with Monday.com support shortly after posting. Have some dialog back and forth but no fix at this time.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@bmack

Thanks for the update. Please let us know if you find out anything.

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
fyi…

URGENT: API stopped returning "text" field for "board_relation" columns monday Apps & Developers
Hi @BraveCarto and @JCorrell We found the root cause of the issue. The fix is deployed to production and it should be back to normal.
